requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 Series for PV Inverters — Iraq COSQC / MoE Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——光伏逆变器IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列——伊拉克COSQC / 电力部要求
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——光伏逆變器IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列——伊拉克COSQC / 電力部要求

summary.en: Iraq's conformity framework under COSQC references IEC and IQS standards for electromagnetic compatibility (EMC). For solar PV inverters, the relevant EMC standards are: (1) IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems: EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment — the dedicated EMC standard for PV inverters covering conducted and radiated emissions as well as immunity; (2) IEC 61000-3-2 — Limits for harmonic current emissions for equipment with input current up to 16 A per phase; (3) IEC 61000-3-3 — Limitation of voltage changes, voltage fluctuations, and flicker. Large-scale solar projects in Iraq tendered by MoE and international project developers reference IEC technical specifications in their procurement documents, which include EMC compliance as part of the inverter equipment package. No standalone COSQC EMC Technical Regulation specifically for solar PV inverters has been identified; EMC requirements are embedded in the IEC-referenced equipment specifications used by project owners and the COSQC conformity assessment framework.
summary.zh: 伊拉克COSQC合格评定框架引用IEC和IQS标准处理电磁兼容（EMC）问题。对于太阳能光伏逆变器，相关EMC标准包括：（1）IEC 62920——光伏发电系统：功率变换设备的电磁兼容要求和测试方法——专用于光伏逆变器的EMC标准，涵盖传导和辐射发射及抗扰度；（2）IEC 61000-3-2——每相输入电流不超过16 A设备的谐波电流排放限值；（3）IEC 61000-3-3——电压变化、电压波动和闪变限制。伊拉克电力部和国际项目开发商招标的大型太阳能项目在采购文件中引用IEC技术规格，其中包括作为逆变器设备包一部分的EMC合规要求。目前尚未发现专门针对太阳能光伏逆变器的独立COSQC EMC技术法规；EMC要求包含在项目业主使用的IEC引用设备规格和COSQC合格评定框架中。
summary.zht: 伊拉克COSQC合格評定框架引用IEC和IQS標準處理電磁相容（EMC）問題。對於太陽能光伏逆變器，相關EMC標準包括：（1）IEC 62920——光伏發電系統：功率轉換設備的電磁相容要求和測試方法——專用於光伏逆變器的EMC標準，涵蓋傳導和輻射排放及抗擾度；（2）IEC 61000-3-2——每相輸入電流不超過16 A設備的諧波電流排放限值；（3）IEC 61000-3-3——電壓變化、電壓波動和閃變限制。伊拉克電力部和國際項目開發商招標的大型太陽能項目在採購文件中引用IEC技術規格，其中包括作為逆變器設備包一部分的EMC合規要求。目前尚未發現專門針對太陽能光伏逆變器的獨立COSQC EMC技術法規；EMC要求包含在項目業主使用的IEC引用設備規格和COSQC合格評定框架中。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment (referenced in IEC-aligned Iraq project procurement specifications)
IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions (equipment up to 16 A per phase)
IEC 61000-3-3 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limitation of voltage changes, voltage fluctuations, and flicker
COSQC conformity assessment framework — cosqc.gov.iq (IQS / IEC alignment for regulated imports)

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC is assessed under GB/T 37408-2021 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), which includes EMC test requirements aligned with China's domestic framework. GB/T 37408 EMC testing is conducted at CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories. While IEC 62920 draws on IEC 61000-series test methods that also inform Chinese domestic standards, GB/T 37408 EMC test scope and referenced limits are not harmonised with IEC 62920 as applied under COSQC conformity or Iraq MoE / project specifications. Chinese EMC certificates based solely on GB/T 37408 are not accepted as IEC 62920 or IEC 61000-3-2 compliance evidence for COSQC conformity assessment or Iraq project submissions.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC依据GB/T 37408-2021（光伏并网逆变器技术要求）进行评估，其中包含与中国国内框架相符的EMC测试要求。GB/T 37408 EMC测试在中国CNAS认可实验室进行。尽管IEC 62920借鉴了同样影响中国国内标准的IEC 61000系列测试方法，但GB/T 37408 EMC测试范围和引用限值未与IEC 62920协调，不被COSQC合格评定或伊拉克电力部/项目规格接受为IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2合规证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC依據GB/T 37408-2021（光伏並網逆變器技術要求）進行評估，其中包含與中國國內框架相符的EMC測試要求。GB/T 37408 EMC測試在中國CNAS認可實驗室進行。儘管IEC 62920借鑑了同樣影響中國國內標準的IEC 61000系列測試方法，但GB/T 37408 EMC測試範圍和引用限值未與IEC 62920協調，不被COSQC合格評定或伊拉克電力部/項目規格接受為IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2合規證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC test requirements

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC testing does not satisfy COSQC conformity or Iraq MoE / project EMC requirements for IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2. Exporters should obtain: (a) IEC 62920 EMC type-test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory covering the specific inverter model; (b) IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic current emission test report for the model. Note: Iraq's grid instability (voltage fluctuations, frequency deviations) may affect EMC performance in the field — consider whether the test conditions adequately represent the operating environment when selecting inverter models for Iraq deployments. These IEC EMC reports should be included in the COSQC pre-shipment inspection documentation package.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 37408 EMC测试不满足COSQC合格评定或伊拉克电力部/项目对IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2的EMC要求。出口商应取得：（a）来自ILAC认可实验室、涵盖特定逆变器型号的IEC 62920 EMC型式试验报告；（b）该型号的IEC 61000-3-2谐波电流排放测试报告。注意：伊拉克电网不稳定性（电压波动、频率偏差）可能影响现场EMC性能——在为伊拉克部署选择逆变器型号时，应考虑测试条件是否充分代表实际运行环境。上述IEC EMC报告应纳入COSQC装运前检查文件包。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 37408 EMC測試不滿足COSQC合格評定或伊拉克電力部/項目對IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2的EMC要求。出口商應取得：（a）來自ILAC認可實驗室、涵蓋特定逆變器型號的IEC 62920 EMC型式試驗報告；（b）該型號的IEC 61000-3-2諧波電流排放測試報告。注意：伊拉克電網不穩定性（電壓波動、頻率偏差）可能影響現場EMC性能——在為伊拉克部署選擇逆變器型號時，應考慮測試條件是否充分代表實際運行環境。上述IEC EMC報告應納入COSQC裝運前檢查文件包。

mandatory_status.target: Required for COSQC conformity assessment and IEC-aligned Iraq MoE / project procurement submission; IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 evidence are expected components of the equipment compliance package
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408-2021 EMC testing is a requirement for voluntary CQC/CGC certification in China; not a standalone mandatory market-access requirement for domestic China PV inverters

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC certificates do not satisfy COSQC conformity or Iraq project IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 requirements. Obtain IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 type-test reports from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for the specific inverter model and include these in the COSQC pre-shipment inspection documentation. Verify current COSQC Technical Regulations and applicable IQS EMC standards directly with COSQC (cosqc.gov.iq) before finalising the compliance package.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 37408 EMC证书不满足COSQC合格评定或伊拉克项目IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。须从ILAC认可实验室取得特定逆变器型号的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式试验报告，并将其纳入COSQC装运前检查文件。在最终确定合规包前，请直接向COSQC（cosqc.gov.iq）核实现行COSQC技术法规和适用IQS EMC标准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 37408 EMC證書不滿足COSQC合格評定或伊拉克項目IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。須從ILAC認可實驗室取得特定逆變器型號的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式試驗報告，並將其納入COSQC裝運前檢查文件。在最終確定合規包前，請直接向COSQC（cosqc.gov.iq）核實現行COSQC技術法規和適用IQS EMC標準。
